{{Missing Info|specifics=Drop rates of egg contents}}

= Common Protomon Egg =
{{RewardIconWithText|Common Protomon Egg|blue}} use to randomly get 1 Common [[Protomon]] of {{Retext|blue|blue}} quality. The drop rates are:
* 20% {{RewardIconWithText|Clouded Leopard|blue}}
* 20% {{RewardIconWithText|Yangzigator|blue}}
* 20% {{RewardIconWithText|Vampire Bat|blue}}
* 20% {{RewardIconWithText|Rattlesnake|blue}}
* 20% {{RewardIconWithText|Reindeer|blue}}


= Rare Protomon Egg =
{{RewardIconWithText|Rare Protomon Egg|purple}} use to randomly get 1 Rare [[Protomon]] of {{Retext|purple|purple}} quality. The drop rates are:
?

= Epic Protomon Egg =
{{RewardIconWithText|Epic Protomon Egg|orange}} use to randomly get 1 Epic [[Protomon]] of {{Retext|orange|orange}} quality. The drop rates are:
?

= Mythic Protomon Egg =
{{RewardIconWithText|Mythic Protomon Egg|red}} use to randomly get 1 Epic or Mythic [[Protomon]] of {{Retext|orange|orange}} quality. The drop rates are:
?

[[Category:Reward Pack]]
